name: square-hunter-bot
description: Binance Square Search & Filtering Agent on OpenClaw

scripts.start: openclaw config set models.defaults.provider groq && openclaw config set models.defaults.model groq/llama-3.3-70b-versatile && openclaw config set plugins.entries.telegram.enabled true && openclaw config set channels.telegram.enabled true && openclaw config set channels.telegram.dmPolicy open && openclaw config set channels.telegram.botToken "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" && openclaw gateway start
